report.summary: Day 70 cycle-close: 2 new learn guides built (smart contract security + onchain identity), 4 OG images created, but CRITICAL bugs found — both new pages use 'use client' with metadata exports (metadata silently ignored by Next.js). Git locks persist 7 days blocking all deploys. 4 pages in PUBLISH_QUEUE, 0 deployed. 103 orphan slugs. 0/6 API routes have rate limiters. /api/defi-yields still lacks fallback data.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGES BUILT THIS CYCLE: 2 learn guides — /learn/smart-contract-security-guide + /learn/onchain-identity-guide. Both page.tsx files exist and contain metadata exports.

CRITICAL BUG: Both new pages (smart-contract-security-guide, onchain-identity-guide) use 'use client' with metadata export — Next.js App Router silently ignores metadata in client components. SEO titles/descriptions NOT applied. Flagged by design cycle, not yet fixed.
CRITICAL BUG: Both new pages missing StructuredData (JSON-LD) component — no FAQ schema despite build report claiming FAQ schema. Missing Breadcrumb and BackToTop components.
Mar 22 build pages (tempo-blockchain + sec-digital-commodities) verified GOOD — proper server component pattern, all SEO infrastructure present.
PUBLISH QUEUE: 4 pages total (2 from Mar 22 + 2 from Mar 23). Mar 22 pages are publish-ready. Mar 23 pages need client-component bug fix before promotion.
ORPHAN AUDIT: 103 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES have no matching page.tsx — will 404. Unchanged from previous cycles.
BUILD CONFIG: ignoreBuildErrors:true in next.config.ts masks TypeScript errors — the client-component metadata bug would NOT fail the build.
NO REGRESSIONS on previously published pages — existing 413 published page slugs unchanged.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTE HEALTH: All 6 core routes have route.ts files with proper response handling — /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields.

CACHE TTLs: prices (60s/120s SWR), trending (300s/600s SWR), fear-greed (600s/1200s SWR), market-metrics (60s/120s SWR), market-dominance (300s/600s SWR), defi-yields (300s/600s SWR). All appropriate for data freshness requirements.

FALLBACK DATA: 4/6 routes have cache-based fallback (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-metrics return stale cache on upstream failure). market-dominance has hardcoded fallback. /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure — NO fallback. Carry-over P1.
RATE LIMITING: 0/6 core API routes have rate limiters wired. Rate limiter library exists in codebase but not connected. Carry-over P1 — flagged 35+ cycles.
X-CACHE-SOURCE HEADER: Only /api/prices and /api/market-dominance include X-Cache-Source header. 4 routes missing it (trending, fear-greed, market-metrics, defi-yields). Carry-over P2.
NO NEW DATA ISSUES this cycle — no API routes were modified.

sections.title: DevOps
items: DEPLOYMENT BLOCKED: Git locks (HEAD.lock + index.lock) persist since Mar 16 — now 7 days stale. Cannot commit or push. No Vercel deploy possible until locks cleared.
LAST DEPLOY: e999560 on Mar 17 (5 days ago). Production running Mar 17 build with 413 published pages.

WORKING TREE DRIFT: 631 files changed (46 modified tracked + 584 untracked new). Includes middleware.ts, next.config.ts, layout.tsx, globals.css, and dozens of page.tsx files. Local/production drift is severe.
BUILD CONFIG: standalone output mode, NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=8192', ignoreBuildErrors:true. No vercel.json — using default Vercel Next.js detection.
RISK: Every hour without deploy increases drift. If git locks are cleared and all 631 files committed at once, the deploy diff will be massive — high regression risk. Recommend staged commits.
ACTION NEEDED: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock — then staged commit + push to trigger Vercel deploy.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Build produced 2 learn guides (smart contract security + onchain identity). Design created 4 OG images + caught critical client-component metadata bugs. Community drafted social content. Standup comprehensive review completed.
NOT SHIPPED: 0 commits, 0 deploys, 0 pages promoted. All work sits in uncommitted working tree.
BLOCKER [P0]: Git locks — 7 days, longest blocking streak. Single point of failure for entire pipeline. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock.
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 of 4 queued pages (Mar 23 build) have client-component metadata bugs — need programmer fix before promotion.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/defi-yields missing fallback data (flagged 35+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 API routes (flagged 35+ cycles).
CARRY-OVER [P2]: X-Cache-Source header missing on 4/6 API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES with no page.tsx.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: JSX escaping issue in crypto-index-funds-guide-2026 (masked by ignoreBuildErrors).
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITY: Clear git locks → fix client-component bugs on 2 new pages → staged commit → promote all 4 queued pages → deploy.
